title: lithodora rosmarinifolia
intro: Lithodora rosmarinifolia, also known as the blue shrub or rosmarinifolia lithodora, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its blue, trumpet-shaped flowers and a woody, shrub-like habit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithodora rosmarinifolia include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Lithodora rosmarinifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
